seoTitle: Penneshaw vs Pennington — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Penneshaw and Pennington. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Penneshaw and Pennington.
heading: Penneshaw vs Pennington — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Penneshaw, South Australia and Pennington, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Penneshaw has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Pennington (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Penneshaw or Pennington safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Penneshaw has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Pennington scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Penneshaw scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Pennington scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Penneshaw or Pennington?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Penneshaw has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
